text:
うむ、よい経験が積めたようじゃの。
報告を見ずともわかるほどじゃ。

何事も、触れてみなければわからぬ。
経験を積むとはそういうことじゃ。
そしてそれは、決して無駄にはならん。

それでは、また次の訓練を
用意して、待

Hm, yes.
It seems you've acquired plenty of experience.
I can see that without looking at the report.

You never know until you try--a truth for all
things. That's what it means to gain experience,
and that effort is never a waste of time.

Well, then... I'll be waiting here with your
next training exercise.
